title: hypericum tomentosum var. pubescens
intro: Hypericum tomentosum var. pubescens, also known as the woody St. John's Wort, is a variety of the Hypericum tomentosum plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of hyperforin and hypericin compounds. The health benefits of Hypericum tomentosum var. pubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to treat anxiety, insomnia, and other mental health conditions. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of depression.
